title: astragalus onobrychis subf. albiflorus
intro: Astragalus onobrychis subf. albiflorus, also known as white-flowered astragalus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Astragalus genus and is commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Astragalus onobrychis subf. albiflorus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. Astragalus onobrychis subf. albiflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and longevity.
